headline: Do Upbeat APH Estimate Revisions Clarify Or Complicate Amphenol's AI Data Center Growth Story?
summary: Recent analyst reports on Amphenol highlighted robust earnings and cash flow trends, upward revisions to earnings estimates, and an upgrade to a more favorable Zacks Rank, all pointing to stronger perceived earnings prospects. An interesting angle is how these estimate upgrades, combined with Amphenol’s diversified end markets and acquisition-driven expansion, may be reinforcing investor confidence in its long-term growth profile. Next, we’ll examine how this wave of upward earnings...

headline: ALAB vs. APH: Which Connectivity Stock Is the Better Bet Today?
summary: Astera Labs ramps up its PCIe 6 portfolio to power AI platforms, but Amphenol's diversified strength makes it the more compelling connectivity pick.

headline: Amphenol (NYSE: APH) Passes Navellier's 8-Rule High Growth Stock Test
summary: Louis Navellier's "Little Book" growth strategy identifies Amphenol Corp. as a top pick, with 8 rules confirmed by 54.4% sales growth, 77.8% EPS growth, and 31.9% ROE.

headline: Mar Vista U.S. Quality Q2 2026 Performance Update
summary: Top Q2 portfolio contributors were GE Aerospace, Amphenol and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing; top detractors were Netflix, Intuit and QXO. Read more here.
